rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.459, which governs commissioner-developed training materials for elective Bible course teachers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The commissioner shall develop and make available training materials and other teacher training resources for a school district to use in assisting teachers of elective Bible courses
_note: No conflict; the cited statute addresses Bible course teacher training, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
